name: de Young Museum
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: New de Young Museum : revisions to final environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: 2001 revisions to the final EIR for the New M.H. de Young Museum, addressing the reduced height of the Education Tower and the shadow and visual analyses.

documents.title: New deYoung [sic] Museum : draft environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 2000 draft EIR for the project to demolish and reconstruct the de Young in Golden Gate Park, removing about 230,000 sq ft of existing buildings.

documents.title: Minutes and Agendas
documents.creator: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco. Board of Trustees
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: Fine Arts Museums Board of Trustees resolutions honoring donors and naming galleries within the New de Young Museum.

documents.title: Minutes
documents.creator: Corporation of the Fine Arts Museums (San Francisco, Calif.). Board of Trustees. Executive Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: COFAM Executive Committee minutes on the "My de Young" public campaign to build the new museum and a lease for a temporary education site while the de Young is closed.

documents.title: Annual report
documents.creator: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 1970–71 annual report records the de Young's van Gogh exhibition, seen by over 400,000, and gifts received by the M.H. de Young Memorial Museum.

documents.title: M.H. de Young Memorial Museum : visitorship, fiscal benefit and economic impact analysis
documents.creator: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco,Sedway Group (Firm)
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1997 Sedway Group study of the de Young's visitorship, fiscal benefit and economic impact, comparing its park site with a downtown location.

documents.title: M.H. de Young Memorial Museum : site selection study
documents.creator: Sedway Consulting (Firm),Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco,ROMA Design Group
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1997 site-selection study setting out the de Young's urban-building concept and its gallery program in square feet.
